弄: to finger; to touch; to play with
赴: moving to a different location to start a new job; (proceeding to) new appointment
遷: transition (esp. in scientific, computing, etc. contexts)
畔: ridge of earth between rice fields
賜: to be given; to be granted; to be honored with
壱: Iki (former province located on Iki Island in present-day Nagasaki Prefecture)
飢: to starve; to be famished; to be hungry
累: cumulative total; accumulated total; total up to now
喋: to talk; to chat; to chatter
斑: unevenness (of colour, paint, etc.); irregularity; nonuniformity
薪: piece(s) of firewood (esp. chopped or split from logs)
渇: to be thirsty; to feel thirsty
遵: observance (of laws, rules, etc.), adherence, obeying
溺: to struggle in the water; to sink below the surface and become unable to breathe; to (nearly) drown
捻: to twist; to wrench; to turn (a tap, switch, etc.)
睦: first month of the lunar calendar
侮: despise, disdain, hold in contempt, make light of
馴: to become familiar with; to get used to; to become accustomed to
悼: to grieve over; to mourn; to lament
勃: erection (of the penis); becoming erect; stiffening
奔: running about, making every effort (to do), busying oneself (with)
遡: to go upstream; to go up (a river)
拐: to carry off; to run away with; to sweep away; to snatch; to kidnap; to abduct
尉: inspector (third highest of the four administrative ranks of the ritsuryō system)
慕: to yearn for; to long for; to pine for
陛: Your Majesty; His Majesty; Her Majesty
這: to crawl out of; to creep out of
倣: to imitate; to follow; to copy
遜: to deprecate oneself and praise the listener; to abase oneself
侯: marquis; second highest rank of the five ranks of nobility
帥: commander-in-chief, leader, head of a group of companies
殉: to sacrifice oneself; to die a martyr
畝: ridge (in field); row of raised earth when planting crops
斤: kin; catty; traditional unit of weight, 600g
厘: one-hundredth; 0.3 mm (one-hundredth of a sun); 0.1 percent (one-hundredth of a wari)
丙: third rank; third class; third person (in a contract, etc.)
隼: falcon (esp. the peregrine falcon, Falco peregrinus)
凌: to endure; to keep out (e.g. rain); to stave off (e.g. starvation)
巴: tomoe; heraldic design composed of two or more interlocked comma-shaped figures
蒔: to sow; to plant; to seed
宥: to soothe; to calm; to pacify
萩: bush clover; Japanese clover (any flowering plant of genus Lespedeza)
卯: the Rabbit (fourth sign of the Chinese zodiac); the Hare
蒲: kabayaki; loach or eel dipped and broiled in soy-based sauce
琉: Ryukyu; chain of southwestern Japanese islands comprising Okinawa Prefecture
嵩: to mount up; to pile up; to accumulate; to increase
檀: family which supports a temple; parishioner
茅: grass used for thatching; sedge used for thatching
秦: Qin dynasty (of China; 221-207 BCE); Ch'in dynasty
寅: the Tiger (third sign of the Chinese zodiac)
黎: daybreak; dawn; gray of the morning (grey)
晋: Jin dynasty (of China; 265-420 CE); Chin dynasty
捺: affixing a seal (to); putting one's seal (on)
鵬: peng (giant bird said to transform from a fish)
偲: to recollect; to remember; to reminisce
蕗: giant butterbur (Petasites japonicus); Japanese sweet coltsfoot
酉: the Rooster (tenth sign of the Chinese zodiac); the Cock; the Chicken
